title: EXECUTIVE POWER SECRETARY OF GOVERNMENT
description: Coordination and Accession Agreement entered into by the Ministry of the Interior and the State of Guerrero, which aims to grant a subsidy for the AVGM/GRO/AC01/SGG/074 Project, which allows compliance with the application of resources forcoadjuvant actions for the declarations of Gender Violence Alert against Women in States and Municipalities for fiscal year 2024.

title: EXECUTIVE POWER SECRETARY OF GOVERNMENT
description: Coordination and Accession Agreement entered into by the Ministry of the Interior and the State of Michoacán de Ocampo, which aims to grant a subsidy for the AVGM/MICH/AC03/SISDMM/027 Project, which allows compliance with the application of reccourses intended for coadjuvant actions for the declarations of Gender Violence Alert against Women in States and Municipalities for fiscal year 2024.

title: Secretariat of Environment and Natural Resources
description: Agreement amending, adding and repealing various articles of the General Administrative Provisions that establish the Guidelines for the minimum requirement of insurance to be contracted by the regulated parties that carry out the activities oftransportation, storage, distribution, compression, decompression, liquefaction, regasification or sale to the public of hydrocarbons or petroleum products.
